profile.name: Pintoo Aggarwal
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer | Backend & Platform Engineer | AI-Augmented Development
profile.subtitle: Backend & Platform Engineer | AI-Augmented Development
profile.description: Senior Software Engineer with over seven years of experience building scalable mobile and backend platforms across fintech, logistics, and enterprise systems. Expert in designing distributed backend systems, building reliable microservices architectures, and improving developer productivity.

achievements: Architected an enterprise Automation Framework Manager enabling scalable job orchestration across distributed systems.
Designed and deployed 4+ Spring Boot microservices powering internal automation platforms.
Implemented OpenAPI-based backend code generation pipelines accelerating engineering velocity.
Developed automated Pull Request validation pipelines using GitHub Actions to enforce engineering standards.
Led adoption of AI-assisted development workflows improving developer productivity.
Developed backend services supporting customer KYC and gold loan disbursements processing thousands of daily transactions.
Built UPI AutoPay-based recurring payment infrastructure processing 15k+ automated transactions monthly.
Led development of a mission-critical internal application used across six operational departments.
Increased crash-free user rate from 85% to 98% through platform stabilization.
Reduced operational support tickets by 30% by improving observability pipelines.
Contributed to the development of patient-facing mobile applications to streamline surgical care journeys.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement secure health data management features.
Optimized mobile app performance ensuring high reliability for critical healthcare workflows.
Led development and deployment of 5 Android applications including Swagit social platform.
Revamped City Domination mobile game scaling to 800k+ installs.
Implemented modern Android architecture using Kotlin, MVVM, and Jetpack components.
Developed core features for medicine delivery and healthcare discovery platforms.
Integrated real-time tracking and payment gateways into the Android application.
Focused on creating intuitive user interfaces for diverse patient demographics.

projects.title: Spreeh
projects.description: A cross-platform wedding event management platform designed for guest coordination and vendor planning.

projects.title: Gold Loan Disbursement Platform
projects.description: Backend services and Android applications powering digital gold loan disbursement and UPI AutoPay repayment workflows at Rupeek.
